---
title: "JointMR: A joint likelihood-based approach for causal effect estimation using multiple GWAS summary databases in Mendelian randomization."
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Real-data analysis workflow using JointMR}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
